name_en: 💰 TRIOMPHE adds a new model 🆕 shoulder bag 💋 It is a versatile 💯 and timeless bag ✨ Made of glossy hand-rubbed calfskin 🅰️ It is truly very stylish! Very versatile! And very durable! No need to handle with care!
